calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Charles Latham or Morris Latham.
Defaults entered against defendant on April 24, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on April 24, 2008
Order waiving witness appearance as default prove-up hearing was filed on June 2, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Charles Latham and Morris Latham as follows:

Damages/Principal - $121,886.04.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,707.99.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $395.00, for a total of $129,489.03.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
